
# Solidity project

Welcome to my Solidity Learning Projects repository! Here, you'll find a collection of projects I've developed while learning Solidity, the programming language for Ethereum smart contracts. These projects represent milestones in my Solidity journey, showcasing my progress and understanding.

Each project comes with detailed documentation, explaining the implemented functionalities and providing code snippets. While these projects may not be production-ready, they serve as a foundation for learning Solidity concepts like smart contract development and contract interaction.

![Logo](data:image/png;base64,)


# Hi, I'm pratik! 👋
